summary: Hydrated preflight shows no security-sensitive refs. The closed memory-proxy candidates are already covered by merged #71506, and the closed fetch-guard DNS-ordering candidate is covered by merged #59007. The remaining open web_fetch trusted-env-proxy opt-in work should stay centralized on #58034; #61518 overlaps but is not the canonical path and should remain open because instant close is disabled.
